role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: In seeking to achieve its investment objective, the Trust will hold Dogecoin and accrue the Sponsor’s management fee (the “Sponsor Fee”) in U.S. dollars. The Trust will value its Dogecoin holdings, net assets and the Shares daily based on the Pricing Benchmark. The Trust is passively managed and does not pursue active management investment strategies, and the Sponsor does not actively manage the Dogecoin held by the Trust.
